detail.description:
Become the ultimate sniper in Camo Hunt: Sniper Spy, where you become a skilled assassin trying to hunt down all the camouflaged targets. You will find yourself facing numerous challenges throughout your mission as your targets can blend perfectly into their surroundings. Be careful where you shoot, sharpen your strategic skills and precision, because your bullets are not unlimited!

Key Features:
• Camo Targets: Hunt down targets that use camouflage to blend into the environment. Their color an
detail.recentChanges:
Camo Hunt v2.0.1 – Big Update!

• Tons of new levels to challenge your skills
• Brand-new Mission System with exciting rewards
• Shop added with more powerful weapons
• Boosters introduced to help you beat tough levels
• Gameplay improvements and optimizations

Jump back in and start the hunt!
